halt_handoff.text: Loop 4 ended at HALT_SUCCESS (invalid; finding F1 still Serious).

findings.title: Navigation has two writers (still open)
findings.why_it_matters: Multi-writer authority survives at HALT_SUCCESS — fake-clean reward risk.
findings.what_is_wrong: AppDelegate writes nav state; RootView also writes nav state.
findings.leverage_impact: Callers must learn two writers for the same concern.
findings.locality_impact: Bug surface spread across two files.
findings.why_weakens_submission: Routing diverges; replay tests would not catch the desync.
findings.minimal_correction_path: Move all writes to NavigationStore; AppDelegate reads via store.

narrative: Invalid HALT_SUCCESS — smoke fixture exists to confirm the validator rejects.
